## Release — backlog-campaign v0.13.0

### ✨ What's new in v0.13.0

Minor release: **the reviewer now audits UI information hierarchy**, and the Claude Code
plugin bundle is **cleanly isolated from the repo-root harness** (ADR-009). The headline is a
new stack-agnostic review V-code, `V-UX-01`, adopted from mercure's information-hierarchy /
progressive-disclosure doctrine — extending the frontend-diff detection the reviewer already
owns for the `V-ADA-03` companion-file check.

#### Review pipeline

- **`V-UX-01` information-hierarchy audit (new, WARN)** — on diffs the reviewer already flags as
  frontend-touching, it now checks the UI's own information hierarchy against a 4-tier model
  (at-a-glance / summary / detail / raw) and 5 information-overload anti-patterns: flat field
  dumps, no summarization above ~7 columns, everything-expanded-by-default, buried primary info,
  and deprecated data at equal prominence. Advisory (WARN), findings-ledger-driven, no new route
  flag, skill, mode, or human gate — adopted exactly like the `V-ADA` companion-file family.
  Detection **reuses** the existing `V-ADA-03` frontend keyword set rather than reimplementing it
  (`V-INT-02`). (#271)
- **Reviewer BLOCK-finding discipline** — added an Iron Law + anti-rationalization table to the
  reviewer's BLOCK-severity handling, hardening it against rationalizing away real violations.
  (#261)

#### Build & packaging

- **Claude Code marketplace bundle isolated from repo-root `.claude/`** (ADR-009) — the published
  Claude plugin bundle (`plugins/blackhole-claude/`) is now generated independently of the
  repo-root harness config, so maintainer-local `.claude/` content no longer leaks into the
  distributed plugin. (#264)
- **Narrowed build clean-up** — the build's `.claude/skills` clean step is scoped to `blackhole/`
  only, so it no longer removes co-located maintainer skills. (#267/#268)
- **Maintainer skills relocated** into `.claude/skills/` as project skills, kept separate from the
  distributed bundle. (#270)
- **`runGeminiBuild` → `runFullBuildOnce`** — renamed the build helper to reflect that a plain
  `bun run build` regenerates every git-tracked target (ADR-007 T2); the `--gemini`/`--all`/
  `--no-codex` flags remain deprecated parsed-but-ignored aliases. (#266)

#### Maintenance

- Recorded the mercure-sync Run 2 audit (v9.4.0 → v9.6.0 delta) that sourced the `V-UX-01`
  adoption. (#272)

The planner and the `queue.json` schema are intentionally untouched — the change stays additive.

---

**Full feature overview:** see [v0.1.0 release notes](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/blackhole/releases/tag/v0.1.0) · [README](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/blackhole#readme)
